title: WorkflowState
description: Current TDD workflow phase + locus of activity. Single source of truth read by status surfaces and the orchestrator.

phase.description: Current TDD phase the orchestrator obeys. planning = /plan (sprint planning: the Spec Author proposes + the PO authors the backlog, before any feature's discovery). discovery -> architectural-review -> test-list-construction -> design-spec-gate -> implementation are the /design + /build phases. deploy = /deploy (the per-sprint working-software check: the Release Engineer deploys + verifies, the PO signs the deploy gate), entered after implementation/review and before shipped. synthesis + abandoned are side outcomes.

cycle_id.description: Identifier of the current TDD cycle, e.g. cycle-001.

experiment_id.description: Identifier of the active experiment branch, e.g. exp-1-postgres-arrays.

last_transition_by.description: Who triggered the most recent phase transition (agent name or HITL email).
